title: alnus × spaethii
intro: Alnus × spaethii, also known as the Spaeth's alder or hybrid alder, is a unique plant species that results from the cross-breeding of the green alder (Alnus viridis) and the black alder (Alnus glutinosa). The medicinal properties of Alnus × spaethii include its ability to act as a diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant, which are attributed to the presence of various bioactive compounds such as flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids. The health benefits associated with the plant include the potential to treat urinary tract infections, reduce inflammation and oxidative stress, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Alnus × spaethii can be used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and are typically consumed as a tea or added to other herbal remedies to enhance their efficacy.
